title: Issue a Certificate for a Kubernetes API Client Using A CertificateSigningRequest — Configure the certificate into kubeconfig
text:
The next step is to add this user into the kubeconfig file.
First, you need to add new credentials:
kubectl config set-credentials myuser --client-key
=
myuser.key --client-certificate
=
myuser.crt --embed-certs
=
true
Then, you need to add the context:
kubectl config set-context myuser --cluster
=
kubernetes --user
=
myuser
To test it:
kubectl --context myuser auth whoami
You should see output confirming that you are “myuser“.
